subcodes.first_line: O servant of the divine Threshold! The letter which thou didst address to Siyyid Asadu'llah was perused. After returning [3.5s]... ...The teacher, when teaching, must be himself fully enkindled, so that his utterance, like unto a flame of fire, may exert influence
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان الهی نامه ای که بسید اسدالله مرقوم نمودی ملاحظه گردید بعد از مراجعت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @being a channel for the Holy Spirit in teaching the Cause, @the state of enkindlement in teaching, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
